title: olearia asterotricha subsp. glaucophylla
intro: Olearia asterotricha subsp. glaucophylla is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, native to Australia, and is also known as Swamp Daisy. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Olearia asterotricha subsp. glaucophylla include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
